name: email-marketing
description: Per-brand email marketing agent team — weekly newsletter production: trend research with a deduplicated topic log, brand-voiced copywriting (subject + A/B variants, preview text, email-safe HTML body), Higgsfield image generation, adversarial QA, and draft delivery to Mailchimp, Klaviyo, Constant Contact, Omnisend, Moosend, or MoeGo. Drafts only — never sends.
